headline: Texas PFAS Probe Tests Lululemon Brand Strength And Investor Confidence
summary: Texas has opened a formal investigation into lululemon athletica over potential use of PFAS chemicals in its apparel and related safety claims. The probe focuses on whether consumers were misled about product safety and the potential presence of so called forever chemicals. Lululemon has publicly denied ongoing PFAS use in its products and stated it is cooperating fully with investigators. The investigation comes at a time when NasdaqGS:LULU is trading at $160.6, with the share price down...
